title: Stir Fry with Orange Peel
description: A savory and sweet stir fry dish made with orange peel and a hint of Mexican flavors.
instructions: Heat the savory oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the red onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the orange peel and cook for 2 minutes, until slightly caramelized.
Add the bell pepper and cook until tender, about 4 minutes.
Add the soy sauce and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with additional orange peel if desired.
